title: Variable rates
doc_html:
§969.14.  Variable rates

An extender of credit may enter into variable rate motor vehicle credit transactions under this Chapter in the manner provided under R.S. 6:242(A)(2).

Acts 1999, No. 794, §1, eff. July 2, 1999.
doc_text:
§969.14.  Variable rates
An extender of credit may enter into variable rate motor vehicle credit transactions under this Chapter in the manner provided under R.S. 6:242(A)(2).
Acts 1999, No. 794, §1, eff. July 2, 1999.
